consistency.class_alignment: Consistent. The feature is explicitly tagged as belonging to the 'paladin' class.
consistency.level_progression: Consistent. The feature lists a primary activation level (6th) and an upgrade level (18th), fitting standard class progression for a permanent passive ability.
consistency.mechanical_description: The description clearly defines the trigger (making a saving throw), the targets (self and friendly creatures within range), the benefit (Charisma modifier bonus, minimum +1), and the necessary condition (must be conscious). It also details the range increase at 18th level.

quality.clarity: High. The mechanics are straightforward and easy to understand.
quality.completeness: High. It covers activation, effect, range, and prerequisites.
quality.balance_consideration: This is a powerful defensive aura. The requirement for Charisma (a primary casting/social stat for Paladins) helps tie it to the class role, and the minimum bonus mitigates issues at very low Charisma scores. The scaling range at 18th level is a typical capstone-style upgrade.

mechanics.trigger: Friendly creature within range must make a saving throw.
mechanics.effect: Add Charisma Modifier (min +1) to the saving throw result.
mechanics.prerequisites: Paladin Level 6, Paladin must be conscious.

analysis.suggestions: No mechanical changes are strictly necessary. The data is clean and accurately reflects a standard 5th Edition Paladin feature.
